text: This dataset supports Sub-Task 1 of the "Advertisement in Retrieval-Augmented Generation" track at Touché 2025. It consists of document segments extracted from the MS MARCO V2.1 collection, retrieved in response to queries sourced from the Webis Generated Native Ads 2024 corpus. The data is designed to facilitate research into how promotional content can be integrated into or identified within RAG-based systems.
